A New Era Begins - Aiper's Smart Yard Ecosystem

Aiper at CES 2026

World's

Smart Robotic Pool Cleaner

Jan 6 - 9 | Booth 52310

Venetian Expo, Hall B, Las Vegas

Aiper's Cognitive Al

Aiper's Cognitive Al operates as an inteligent continuous loop that enables the robot to see, interpret, decide, and adapt in real time. Building on AI vision cleaning, it further allows the robot to refine its cleaning patterns, frequency, and intensity by analyzing pool size, weather condi tions, and historical cleaning data, delivering a fully automated and carefree pool cleaning all week long.

Aiper Smart Yard Ecosystem

Scuba V3 Ultra

Scuba V3 Ultra is the World’s 1st Cognitive AI Powered 6-in-1 Robotic Pool Cleaner, designed to deliver complete care across every zone of the pool. Its Dual Camera Cognitive AI Vision, VisionPath 2.0 navigation, and Navium Mode work together to recognize debris instantly, adapt routes in real time, and automate smart, weekly maintenance with reliable precision.

Scuba V3 Pro

Scuba V3 Pro is the world’s 1st Cognitive AI powered self-optimizing pool cleaner, designed for faster, smarter, and more autonomous care. Dual-camera AI Patrol Cleaning and Navium™ Mode analyze your pool, adapt cleaning paths, and run weekly plans automatically—delivering consistent, high-coverage performance from floor to wall.

Scuba V3

Scuba V3 is the world’s 1st Cognitive AI powered essential robotic pool cleaner, built to make everyday maintenance simple and hands-free. Using a front-facing camera and Cognitive AI, it recognizes debris in real time and cleans efficiently—delivering reliable results in a lightweight, easy-to-use design.

IrriSense 2

IrriSense 2 is the world’s first 4-in-1 smart irrigation system, designed for plant-specific multi-zone watering with adaptive, weather-responsive control—delivering efficient irrigation while saving up to 40% water.

Join the Facebook Group

IrriSense 2

EcoSurfer Senti

EcoSurfer Senti is the World’s 1st Proactive AI Powered Skimmer with Integrated Water Quality Management. Its AI Surface Patrol Cleaning scans the water, identifies debris in real time. Continuous water monitoring and automated dosing maintain reliable chemistry control, while solar-powered operation and intelligent obstacle avoidance provide fully autonomous, eco-efficient performance.

EcoSurfer Senti

Aiper At CES

*Aiper is the No.1 brand of smart robotic pool cleaner in the world in terms of sales volume

Source: Euromonitor International Co., Ltd., in terms of 2025 manufacturer sales volume (units) in the world. Smart robotic pool cleaner is defined as: intelligent service robots integrating mechanical, electronic, software algorithm and sensor technologies. They autonomously or with minimal human intervention perform pool cleaning and maintenance tasks, typically featuring smart navigation, path planning, and multiple cleaning modes. Research completed in 2025/12.
